feedback.text: Once again, corporations and governments try to overstep they reach, for even more control and manipulation. In today's day age it seems that everyone pushes that you have less freedom, freewill and control over anything you do and own. Once something was purchased, with your earned money it should belong to you and you should be able to do with that device whatever you desire. Just like every company or government does. You cannot expect people to simply bend over and have their rights stripped from them while everyone else gets to do what they want because they have the financial means to 'buy' their way. If users want to avoid ads, or limitations, or avoid being constantly monitored maybe that speaks more about the directiojn the world is going to and we should do something to prevent corporations having access to everything they desire, with no regards to law or safety. When billion dollar corporations constantly push to have their way, you can clearly see this isn't about the wellbeing of the user, but more about their control and marketshare. How about we try to work on improving things and solving issues instead of creating more and relinquishing more control to entities who only see us as disposable income.
